transcript.content: 或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归
已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

已经把 harder case 补进固定回归了。 新增 case： - `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` - 文件：[evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
要；尽量不是白名单，有硬编码嫌疑；
已经收住了，而且不是靠白名单。 我做了两步： - 把中文多轮切题 harder case 收进固定回归 - 再把 packaged guard 收紧成“不能覆盖 shadow guard 的否决”
那刚才不通过的测试，可以重新测试，预期是可以通过了对么？
能自动跑的，你帮我跑一遍
我已经替你自动跑了一遍： ```bash node scripts/eval-codex-context-minor-gc-live.js --format markdown ```

decision.archive_summary: The thread focused on extending Codex Context Minor GC regression coverage and validating behavior. Completed work included adding repeatable smoke/eval coverage, adding harder Chinese multi-topic detour cases, loosening guarded relation handling to include `continue`, and tightening packaged guard behavior so it cannot override shadow-guard vetoes. Durable preference: avoid whitelist-style or hardcoded handling when fixing GC behavior. Latest execution result: the runnable live eval command was run and reported as completed successfully.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic appears resolved: the user asked whether the previously failing test could now pass and then asked to run the automatable test, and the assistant reported having run it. Earlier turns are solved implementation/status updates and are good eviction candidates. I pinned the anti-whitelist preference as a durable engineering constraint and pinned the final test-run outcome so follow-up discussion can retain the result without keeping the full raw block.
